name: farmers-boot
description: Farmers Boot - Comprehensive Farm Management Application

scripts.deploy:web: cd apps/web && npm run build && npm run deploy
scripts.perf:auth: echo "Run: k6 run performance-tests/auth.k6.js --env BASE_URL=http://localhost:5757 --env TEST_USER_EMAIL=perfuser@example.com --env TEST_USER_PASSWORD=PerfPassw0rd! --vus 50 --duration 30s"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:e2e && npm run test:performance
scripts.build:ci: cd apps/web && VITE_MAPBOX_TOKEN=dummy_token npm run build
scripts.supabase:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.supabase.yml down -v && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./start-supabase.ps1
scripts.deploy:frontend:staging: cd apps/web && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --branch staging
scripts.deploy:frontend:production: cd apps/web && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --branch main
